name: Node (V8)
desc: Node.js runtime with V8 engine and WASI support.
install-command: mkdir -p node-v8 && cd node-v8 && export HOME="$PWD" && export XDG_CONFIG_HOME="$PWD" && export NVM_DIR="$PWD/nvm" && curl -o- https://raw.githubusercontent.com/nvm-sh/nvm/master/install.sh | bash && . "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" && nvm install --lts && mkdir -p bin && ln -sf "$(nvm which current)" bin/node && cp ../../installers/v8/run.mjs run.mjs
update-command: cd node-v8 && export HOME="$PWD" && export XDG_CONFIG_HOME="$PWD" && export NVM_DIR="$PWD/nvm" && . "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" && nvm install --lts && ln -sf "$(nvm which current)" bin/node
